notes.en: Support [[character:dehya]] uses her [[ability:skill]] to do passive damage and apply [[element:pyro]], while providing the team with interruption resistance and tank damage.
notes.fr: [[character:dehya]] Support utilise son [[ability:skill]] pour infliger des dégâts de manière passive et appliquer [[element:pyro]], tout en offrant de la résistance à l'interruption et en tankant les dégâts.
notes.it: [[character:dehya]] Supporto utilizza la sua [[ability:skill]] per provocare danni passivi ed applicare [[element:pyro]], al contempo fornendo al team resistenza all'interruzione e protezione dai danni.

notes.en: Support [[character:dehya]] is not reliant on her [[ability:burst]] to support the team as a damage tank.
notes.fr: [[character:dehya]] Support ne dépend pas de son [[ability:burst]] pour être un support tank pour l'équipe.
notes.it: [[character:dehya]] Supporto non è dipendente dal suo [[ability:burst]] per supportare il team come 'tank' di danni.
